title: belvisia australis
intro: Belvisia australis, also known as the Australian belvisia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stemonuraceae, native to the tropical regions of Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Belvisia australis include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as providing relief from fever and respiratory issues. Belvisia australis is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it may also be used in tincture or ointment form to harness its medicinal properties.
